_comment: Reference for the Play Console Data Safety form (Orest Driver, com.orestexpress.driver). Each entry is what to enter for each prompt. Keep this in sync with ios/App/App/PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy — the same data crossings the same boundaries must answer the same way on both stores.

data_collected._note: NOT collected since b336518 removed all location permissions and the background-geolocation plugin (verified: no LOCATION in AndroidManifest, no NSLocation strings, no geolocation plugin in package.json). Vehicle positions on the dispatch map come from Samsara telematics hardware in the truck, never from this app. If location is ever re-added, flip this AND re-add the PreciseLocation dict in ios/App/App/PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy.
BOL/POD/damage captures attached to a shipment record.
FCM push registration token, biometric refresh-token device id.
Sentry. No PII beyond the user-id tag; stack frames are scrubbed for tokens.

security_practices._delete_request_path: Driver contacts dispatch / HR — admin clears the account; biometric tokens are auto-revoked.

_remember_when_updating: If you add a new data type to PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy, add it here too — and vice versa.
If a data type becomes optional (e.g. behind a profile toggle), set 'optional': true and document the toggle path.
Whenever you change a 'shared' answer, sync the iOS App Privacy details in App Store Connect (same data, separate UI).
